Here you can find the events that I took responsibility for organizing and created the visual identity for by designing posters. My favorite hobby is using new techniques and integrating them into the poster design. I also created a website called HfK Events — What's on at Hochschule für Künste Bremen, where everyone at HfK can add their events and see the whole calendar of what's happening around school.
